category_sources: Official docs at https://skip.dev/docs/ describe building native iOS and Android apps from Swift and SwiftUI.
source_facts.description says it builds Swift apps for Android.
display_name_sources: Official docs and homepage use Skip as the project name.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/skiptools/skipstone; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Skip docs describe Swift, SwiftUI, Android, Kotlin/Compose, and CLI workflows.
